reviews.review_title: ITS actually a very very good game
reviews.review_description:
But add OG back because the music was like ba ba ba ber dun dun dun dun and servers PLS fix it please that’s all I say 
￼
The public server doesn’t work because of the new menu to load in the game, the public button on the server tab on the menu is broken and I can’t play the game, please fix it.

developer_response.body: sorry for being so dang late, its because i quit, game was gonna get hacked so i took down server then the whole dang project crashed, i guess god said im not suppose to be working on this anymore lol

reviews.review_description: I love this game and it’s also really fun to play. I love the monsters actually pretty scary and I can tell that you did a lot of hard work on this. I even met a moderator in the game and it’s still really good today.
The game is super fun and scary to play with friends
I had so many memories. They said they were discontinuing the game. For anyone know if there is a new version or anything yet??? I love this game and I would hate for it to go to waste…
I’ve been crying because I haven’t played this game in two years. Please bring it back 😢￼
Tbh at first i didnt like the game but as i got better at it it became more fun also i recommend the game to my friends and now we all enjoy the game

At first play I loved it I met the owner and was running around having fun grandma was fun to run from the jumpscare was scary and I loved it in general I got a glow stick and a Japanese along with a suit and tie box as my cosmetics 

Hope the owner remembers me

I first got this game to record it and post to my yt channel and I did, but while I was playing I found a weird bug. whenever you go out of the horror Map the monsters will sometimes chase you out of the horror map and sometimes float and also jumpscare you randomly. Also I might be wrong but there is no mute button for the music which is incredibly loud!


You can go to my youtube channel HC-tordo_takis and watch the recording if you want...
